name: Ansvar Gateway (Dutch law)
description_en: Search Dutch legislation and Rechtspraak rulings through Ansvar's hosted OAuth gateway, every result citing its source (also spans EU and other jurisdictions).

name: Belastingzaken skills
description_en: Eight commands and eight skills for Dutch income tax, BTW, VPB, payroll tax, deductions, and objections — no filing, professional review required.

name: FALCON / nl-ai-lawyer
description_en: Advise on Dutch law — employment/CAO, AVG, tax, real estate, and immigration — through 14 skills and 7 specialist agents.

name: dutch-energy-regulation-mcp
description_en: Search Dutch energy-regulation records from ACM, TenneT, RVO, and SodM.

name: rechtspraak-solr-mcp-server
description_en: Full-text search Dutch case law in Solr, with query expansion, legal synonyms, and citation analysis.

name: nl-eli-mcp
description_en: Retrieve versioned Dutch legislation (BWB) and Rechtspraak rulings, keyless.

name: ICTRecht skill
description_en: A Dutch IT-law firm's methodology as a skill — privacy-officer, compliance, and IE-recht role profiles with DPIA and AI Act assessment structures.

name: aangifte-ib-skill
description_en: A skill that prepares a sourced Dutch personal income-tax return with an adaptive interview and review dossier.

name: rechtspraak-mcp
description_en: Search Rechtspraak open data and resolve legal citations through LiDO, across six tools.

name: OpenAccountants Plugin
description_en: Classify transactions and apply accountant-verified guidance for Dutch VAT, income tax, and social contributions.

name: Moonlit Legal Research MCP
description_en: Research Dutch and European legislation, case law, and regulatory sources through seven read-only tools over a hosted OAuth endpoint.

name: wetten-overheid-tools
description_en: Search Dutch legislation on wetten.overheid.nl and retrieve its structure, articles, and terms.
